gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/323)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/323)
text: مَنْ رَضِيَ مِنَ اللَّهِ بِالْيَسِيرِ مِنَ الْمَعَاشِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ مِنْهُ بِالْيَسِيرِ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bi nIsa, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Al Haysam Bin Waqid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who was satisfied from Allah<sup>azwj</sup> with the less from the livelihood, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would be Pleased with him from the less, from the deeds’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from al- Haytham ibn Waqid from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever is happy with the little sustenance (that Allah has given him), Allah becomes happy with his little good deeds.”
